purpose: A custom JavaFX control that displays a selectable character (letters and digits) with toggle functionality, supporting mouse and touch interactions for navigation through characters.

return_value.description: The character at the current counter index from the CHARACTERS array

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: The color to set for the font

methods.code: public ToggleGroup getToggleGroup() { return null == toggleGroup ? null : toggleGroupProperty().get(); }

return_value.description: The toggle group this toggle belongs to

methods.code: public void setToggleGroup(final ToggleGroup toggleGroup) { toggleGroupProperty().set(toggleGroup); }

return_value.description: An ObjectProperty for the toggle group

methods.code: public void setSelected(final boolean selected) { this.selected.set(selected); }

parameters.name: selected
parameters.description: Whether this toggle should be selected

return_value.description: The clamped value within the min and max range
